STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.description: Gain one of two powerful effects this combat.
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.smartDescrip: Gain one of two powerful effects for this combat.
STS2CHARTEST-OVERHEAT_POWER.title: Overheat
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.description: Creatures with Embers take damage equal to the stack when [gold]Blaze[/gold] is triggered and then lose half the stack.
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.smartDescripti: At end of the {OnPlayer:player|enemy} turn takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage and is then reduced by half (rounded up).
STS2CHARTEST-EMBERS_POWER.title: Embers
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.descript: For the turn gain Heat equal to half of any attack damage dealt.
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.smartDes: For {Amount:cond:>1?the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns|this turn}, gain [gold]Heat[/gold] equal to half of any attack damage dealt.
STS2CHARTEST-JUST_THE_TIP_POWER.title: Just The Tip
STS2CHARTEST-MELTING_POINT_POWER.smartDe: Take double damage from [gold]Embers[/gold] for {Amount:plural:this turn|the next {} turns}.
STS2CHARTEST-MELTING_POINT_POWER.title: Melting Point
STS2CHARTEST-OBSIDIAN_SKIN_POWER.descrip: At the start of the turn, lose 1 [gold]Heat[/gold]. Whenever you lose [gold]Heat[/gold], gain Block.
STS2CHARTEST-OBSIDIAN_SKIN_POWER.smartDe: At the start of turn, lose 1 [gold]Heat[/gold]. Whenever you lose [gold]Heat[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} Block.
STS2CHARTEST-OBSIDIAN_SKIN_POWER.title: Obsidian Skin
STS2CHARTEST-BURN_IT_DOWN_POWER.descript: Whenever you draw a Status card, exhaust it, draw a card and deal damage to a random enemy.
STS2CHARTEST-BURN_IT_DOWN_POWER.smartDes: Whenever you draw a Status card, exhaust it, draw a card and deal {Amount:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
STS2CHARTEST-BURN_IT_DOWN_POWER.title: Burn It Down
STS2CHARTEST-FLYING_POWER.smartDescripti: Take [gold]50%[/gold] less damage from attacks for {Amount:plural:this turn|the next {} turns}.
STS2CHARTEST-FLYING_POWER.title: Flying
